info.title: Technitium DNS Server API
info.description:
HTTP API for Technitium DNS Server v14.3. All requests support GET or POST unless explicitly noted. POST requires Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded for form data, or multipart/form-data for file uploads. Authentication uses a non-expiring API token passed as ?token= query parameter. A token can be created via /api/user/createToken, and vendor guidance also documents additional token generation workflows ([point #1](https://blog.technitium.com/2023/03/how-to-auto-renew-ssl-certificates-with.html)).

This OpenAPI document is community-generated from vendor documentation and is not an official vendor-published OpenAPI spec. Source: [Technitium APIDOCS.md](https://github.com/TechnitiumSoftware/DnsServer/blob/master/APIDOCS.md).

scheme.description: Protocol for the DNS server endpoint. Use http for local/offline access, or https when TLS is enabled.

get.description: Returns the DNS stats displayed on the web console dashboard.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Session token from login or createToken.

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: Node domain name for stats. Omit for current node. Use 'cluster' for aggregate cluster stats (requires Clustering).

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Duration type for stats. Default is LastHour.

parameters.name: utc
parameters.description: Set true to return main chart labels in UTC ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: dontTrimQueryTypeData
parameters.description: Set true to return full query type chart data instead of top 10 entries. Default false.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Start date in ISO 8601 format. Applies only to Custom type.

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: End date in ISO 8601 format. Applies only to Custom type.

get.description: Returns top stats data for a specified stats type (TopClients, TopDomains, or TopBlockedDomains).

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Session token from login or createToken.

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: Node domain name for stats. Omit for current node. Use 'cluster' for aggregate cluster stats (requires Clustering).

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Duration type for stats. Default is LastHour.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Start date in ISO 8601 format. Applies only to custom type.

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: End date in ISO 8601 format. Applies only to custom type.

parameters.name: statsType
parameters.description: The type of top stats to retrieve.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return. Default is 1000.

parameters.name: noReverseLookup
parameters.description: Set true to disable reverse DNS lookup for Top Clients. Only applies to TopClients statsType.

parameters.name: onlyRateLimitedClients
parameters.description: Set true to list only rate-limited clients. Only applies to TopClients statsType.

200.description: Top stats response. The response key matches the requested statsType (topClients, topDomains, or topBlockedDomains).

get.description: Permanently deletes all hourly and daily stats files from disk and clears all stats stored in memory. Clears all data from the Dashboard.

get.description: Creates a new authoritative zone. Supports Primary, Secondary, Stub, Forwarder, SecondaryForwarder, Catalog, and SecondaryCatalog types. Use POST with multipart form data to import a zone file during creation.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Session token from login or createToken.

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: Node domain name for clustering. Defaults to current node.

parameters.name: zone
parameters.description: Domain name, IP address, or CIDR network address for the new zone.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The type of zone to create.

parameters.name: catalog
parameters.description: Catalog zone name to register as member. Valid for Primary, Secondary, Stub, and Forwarder zones.

parameters.name: useSoaSerialDateScheme
parameters.description: Enable date scheme for SOA serial. Valid for Primary, Forwarder, and Catalog zones.

parameters.name: primaryNameServerAddresses
parameters.description: Comma-separated IP addresses or domain names of primary name server(s). Used with Secondary, SecondaryForwarder, SecondaryCatalog, and Stub zones.

parameters.name: zoneTransferProtocol
parameters.description: Zone transfer protocol for Secondary, SecondaryForwarder, and SecondaryCatalog zones.

parameters.name: tsigKeyName
parameters.description: TSIG key name for Secondary, SecondaryForwarder, and SecondaryCatalog zones.

parameters.name: validateZone
parameters.description: Enable ZONEMD validation for Secondary zones. Zone must be DNSSEC signed.

parameters.name: initializeForwarder
parameters.description: Initialize Forwarder zone with an FWD record. Set false for an empty Forwarder zone.

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.description: DNS transport protocol for Forwarder zones. Requires initializeForwarder=true.

parameters.name: forwarder
parameters.description: Address of DNS server to use as forwarder, or 'this-server'. Requires initializeForwarder=true.

parameters.name: dnssecValidation
parameters.description: Enable DNSSEC validation for Forwarder zones. Requires initializeForwarder=true.

parameters.name: proxyType
parameters.description: Proxy type for conditional forwarding. Requires initializeForwarder=true.

parameters.name: proxyAddress
parameters.description: Proxy server address. Requires initializeForwarder=true.

parameters.name: proxyPort
parameters.description: Proxy server port. Requires initializeForwarder=true.

parameters.name: proxyUsername
parameters.description: Proxy server username. Requires initializeForwarder=true.

parameters.name: proxyPassword
parameters.description: Proxy server password. Requires initializeForwarder=true.

get.description: Sets zone-specific options including query access, zone transfer, notify, and dynamic update settings.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Session token from login or createToken.

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: Node domain name for clustering. Defaults to current node.

parameters.name: zone
parameters.description: Domain name of the zone to configure.

parameters.name: disabled
parameters.description: Enable or disable the zone.

parameters.name: catalog
parameters.description: Catalog zone name to register as member. Valid for Primary, Secondary, Stub, and Forwarder zones.

parameters.name: overrideCatalogQueryAccess
parameters.description: Override Query Access from Catalog zone settings.

parameters.name: overrideCatalogZoneTransfer
parameters.description: Override Zone Transfer from Catalog zone settings. Valid for Primary, Secondary, and Forwarder zones.

parameters.name: overrideCatalogNotify
parameters.description: Override Notify from Catalog zone settings. Valid for Primary and Forwarder zones.

parameters.name: primaryNameServerAddresses
parameters.description: Comma-separated primary name server addresses. Used with Secondary, SecondaryForwarder, SecondaryCatalog, and Stub zones.

parameters.name: primaryZoneTransferProtocol
parameters.description: Zone transfer protocol for Secondary, SecondaryForwarder, and SecondaryCatalog zones.

parameters.name: primaryZoneTransferTsigKeyName
parameters.description: TSIG key name for zone transfer in Secondary, SecondaryForwarder, and SecondaryCatalog zones.

parameters.name: validateZone
parameters.description: Enable ZONEMD validation for Secondary zones.

parameters.name: queryAccess
parameters.description: Controls which clients can query this zone.

parameters.name: queryAccessNetworkACL
parameters.description: Comma-separated ACL for query access. Prefix with ! to deny. Use 'false' to clear. Valid when queryAccess is UseSpecifiedNetworkACL or AllowZoneNameServersAndUseSpecifiedNetworkACL.

parameters.name: zoneTransfer
parameters.description: Zone transfer policy. Valid for Primary and Secondary zones.

parameters.name: zoneTransferNetworkACL
parameters.description: Comma-separated ACL for zone transfer. Use 'false' to clear. Valid for Primary, Secondary, Forwarder, and Catalog zones.

parameters.name: zoneTransferTsigKeyNames
parameters.description: Comma-separated TSIG key names authorized for zone transfer. Use 'false' to clear.

parameters.name: notify
parameters.description: Notify policy for zone updates. Valid options vary by zone type.

parameters.name: notifyNameServers
parameters.description: Comma-separated IP addresses to notify for zone updates.

parameters.name: notifySecondaryCatalogsNameServers
parameters.description: Comma-separated IPs to notify for catalog zone updates. Used when notify=SeparateNameServersForCatalogAndMemberZones. Valid for Catalog zones only.

parameters.name: update
parameters.description: Dynamic update policy (RFC 2136). Valid for Primary, Secondary, and Forwarder zones.

parameters.name: updateNetworkACL
parameters.description: Comma-separated ACL for dynamic updates. Use 'false' to clear.

parameters.name: updateSecurityPolicies
parameters.description: Pipe-separated table of TSIG key name, domain, and allowed record types. Use 'false' to clear. Valid for Primary and Forwarder zones.

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: Node domain name for clustering. Defaults to current node.

parameters.name: zone

parameters.name: userPermissions

parameters.name: groupPermissions
parameters.description: Pipe-separated table of group name and view/modify/delete booleans. e.g. group1|true|true|true|group2|true|true|false

get.description: Signs a Primary zone using DNSSEC.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Session token from login or createToken.

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: Node domain name for clustering. Defaults to current node.

parameters.name: zone
parameters.description: Name of the Primary zone to sign.

parameters.name: algorithm
parameters.description: Signing algorithm.

parameters.name: pemKskPrivateKey
parameters.description: User-specified PEM private key for KSK. Auto-generated if omitted.

parameters.name: pemZskPrivateKey
parameters.description: User-specified PEM private key for ZSK. Auto-generated if omitted.

parameters.name: hashAlgorithm
parameters.description: Hash algorithm for RSA signing. Required when algorithm=RSA.

parameters.name: kskKeySize
parameters.description: KSK key size in bits. Required when algorithm=RSA.

parameters.name: zskKeySize
parameters.description: ZSK key size in bits. Required when algorithm=RSA.

parameters.name: curve
parameters.description: Curve name. P256/P384 for ECDSA; ED25519/ED448 for EDDSA. Required when using ECDSA or EDDSA.

parameters.name: dnsKeyTtl
parameters.description: TTL for DNSKEY records in seconds.

parameters.name: zskRolloverDays
parameters.description: Frequency in days for automatic ZSK rollover. 0 disables rollover.

parameters.name: nxProof
parameters.description: Proof of non-existence type.

parameters.name: iterations
parameters.description: NSEC3 hash iterations. Only used when nxProof=NSEC3.

parameters.name: saltLength
parameters.description: NSEC3 salt length in bytes. Only used when nxProof=NSEC3.

get.description: Adds a DNSSEC private key for zone signing. Generates a new key or accepts a user-supplied PEM key.

parameters.name: pemPrivateKey

parameters.name: hashAlgorithm

parameters.name: keySize

parameters.name: curve
parameters.description: Curve name. P256/P384 for ECDSA; ED25519/ED448 for EDDSA. Required when using ECDSA or EDDSA.

get.description: Adds a resource record for an authoritative zone.

parameters.description: Authoritative zone name. Defaults to closest authoritative zone.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: DNS resource record type.

parameters.name: ttl
parameters.description: TTL in seconds. Defaults to server default.

parameters.name: overwrite
parameters.description: Overwrite existing record set for type.

parameters.name: expiryTtl
parameters.description: Auto-delete after this many seconds since last modified.

parameters.name: ipAddress
parameters.description: IP address for A/AAAA record. Use 'request-ip-address' for dynamic DNS.

parameters.name: ptr
parameters.description: Add reverse PTR record (A/AAAA only).

parameters.name: createPtrZone
parameters.description: Create reverse zone for PTR record (A/AAAA only).

parameters.name: updateSvcbHints
parameters.description: Update SVCB/HTTPS automatic hints (A/AAAA only).

parameters.name: nameServer
parameters.description: Name server domain name. Required for NS record.

parameters.name: glue
parameters.description: Glue address for NS record.

parameters.name: cname
parameters.description: CNAME domain name. Required for CNAME record.

parameters.name: ptrName
parameters.description: PTR domain name. Required for PTR record.

parameters.name: exchange
parameters.description: Exchange domain name. Required for MX record.

parameters.name: preference
parameters.description: Preference value. Required for MX record.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Text data. Required for TXT record.

parameters.name: splitText
parameters.description: Split text on newlines into multiple character-strings (TXT).

parameters.name: mailbox
parameters.description: Email address for RP record.

parameters.name: txtDomain
parameters.description: TXT record domain name for RP record.

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Priority. Required for SRV record.

parameters.name: weight
parameters.description: Weight. Required for SRV record.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: Port. Required for SRV record.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Target. Required for SRV record.

parameters.name: naptrOrder
parameters.description: NAPTR order. Required for NAPTR record.

parameters.name: naptrPreference
parameters.description: NAPTR preference. Required for NAPTR record.

parameters.name: naptrFlags
parameters.description: NAPTR flags. Required for NAPTR record.

parameters.name: naptrServices
parameters.description: NAPTR services. Required for NAPTR record.

parameters.name: naptrRegexp
parameters.description: NAPTR regexp. Required for NAPTR record.

parameters.name: naptrReplacement
parameters.description: NAPTR replacement. Required for NAPTR record.

parameters.name: dname
parameters.description: DNAME domain name. Required for DNAME record.

parameters.name: keyTag
parameters.description: Key tag. Required for DS record.

parameters.name: algorithm
parameters.description: Algorithm. Required for DS record.

parameters.name: digestType
parameters.description: Digest type. Required for DS record.

parameters.name: digest
parameters.description: Hex digest string. Required for DS record.

parameters.name: sshfpAlgorithm
parameters.description: SSHFP algorithm. Required for SSHFP record.

parameters.name: sshfpFingerprintType
parameters.description: SSHFP fingerprint type. Required for SSHFP record.

parameters.name: sshfpFingerprint
parameters.description: SSHFP hex fingerprint. Required for SSHFP record.

parameters.name: tlsaCertificateUsage
parameters.description: TLSA certificate usage. Required for TLSA record.

parameters.name: tlsaSelector
parameters.description: TLSA selector. Required for TLSA record.

parameters.name: tlsaMatchingType
parameters.description: TLSA matching type. Required for TLSA record.

parameters.name: tlsaCertificateAssociationData
parameters.description: X509 PEM or hex string. Required for TLSA record.

parameters.name: svcPriority
parameters.description: Priority for SVCB/HTTPS record. Required for SVCB/HTTPS.

parameters.name: svcTargetName
parameters.description: Target domain name for SVCB/HTTPS record. Required for SVCB/HTTPS.

parameters.name: svcParams
parameters.description: Pipe-separated key|value service params e.g. 'alpn|h2,h3|port|53443'. Set to 'false' to clear. Required for SVCB/HTTPS.

parameters.name: autoIpv4Hint
parameters.description: Enable automatic ipv4hint in svcParams (SVCB/HTTPS only).

parameters.name: autoIpv6Hint
parameters.description: Enable automatic ipv6hint in svcParams (SVCB/HTTPS only).

parameters.name: uriPriority
parameters.description: Priority for URI record.

parameters.name: uriWeight
parameters.description: Weight for URI record.

parameters.name: uri
parameters.description: URI value for URI record.

parameters.description: Set to true to enable DNSSEC validation.

parameters.description: The network address to be used with EDNS Client Subnet option in the request.

parameters.description: When true, the DNS query response is imported into an authoritative zone on this DNS server. Requires Zones Modify permission.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The session token generated by the login or createToken call.

dnsServerDomain.description: The primary domain name used by this DNS Server to identify itself.

dnsServerLocalEndPoints.description: Comma-separated local end point IP addresses and ports for the DNS Server to listen on.

dnsServerIPv4SourceAddresses.description: Comma-separated IPv4 source addresses for outbound DNS requests.

dnsServerIPv6SourceAddresses.description: Comma-separated IPv6 source addresses for outbound DNS requests.

defaultRecordTtl.description: (cluster) Default TTL value for records when not specified.

defaultNsRecordTtl.description: (cluster) Default TTL for NS records in a Primary Zone.

defaultSoaRecordTtl.description: (cluster) Default TTL for SOA records in a Primary Zone.

defaultResponsiblePerson.description: (cluster) Default SOA Responsible Person email address.

useSoaSerialDateScheme.description: (cluster) Default SOA Serial option for new Primary Zones.

minSoaRefresh.description: (cluster) Minimum Refresh interval for secondary/stub zones. Default 300.

minSoaRetry.description: (cluster) Minimum Retry interval for secondary/stub zones. Default 300.

zoneTransferAllowedNetworks.description: (cluster) Comma-separated networks allowed to perform zone transfer without TSIG authentication.

notifyAllowedNetworks.description: (cluster) Comma-separated networks allowed to Notify secondary zones.

dnsAppsEnableAutomaticUpdate.description: (cluster) Allow DNS server to automatically update DNS Apps every 24hrs.

preferIPv6.description: Use IPv6 for querying whenever possible. Default false.

enableUdpSocketPool.description: Enable UDP socket pool for all outbound DNS-over-UDP requests.

socketPoolExcludedPorts.description: Comma-separated port numbers to exclude from UDP socket pool.

udpPayloadSize.description: (cluster) Max EDNS UDP payload size (512-4096 bytes). Default 1232.

eDnsClientSubnetIPv4PrefixLength.description: (cluster) EDNS Client Subnet IPv4 prefix length. Default 24.

eDnsClientSubnetIPv6PrefixLength.description: (cluster) EDNS Client Subnet IPv6 prefix length. Default 56.

eDnsClientSubnetIpv4Override.description: (cluster) IPv4 network address to use as ECS for all outbound requests.

eDnsClientSubnetIpv6Override.description: (cluster) IPv6 network address to use as ECS for all outbound requests.

qpmPrefixLimitsIPv4.description: (cluster) Pipe-separated multi-row list of prefix, udpLimit, tcpLimit for IPv4. Set to false to remove all.

qpmPrefixLimitsIPv6.description: (cluster) Pipe-separated multi-row list of prefix, udpLimit, tcpLimit for IPv6. Set to false to remove all.

qpmLimitSampleMinutes.description: (cluster) Client query stats sample size in minutes for QPM limit. Default 5.

qpmLimitUdpTruncationPercentage.description: (cluster) Percentage of over-QPM UDP requests responded with TC (0-100). Default 50.

qpmLimitBypassList.description: (cluster) Comma-separated IP/network addresses allowed to bypass QPM limit.

clientTimeout.description: (cluster) Milliseconds to wait before responding with ServerFailure (1000-10000). Default 4000.

tcpSendTimeout.description: (cluster) Max milliseconds a TCP socket will wait for response to be sent (1000-90000). Default 10000.

tcpReceiveTimeout.description: (cluster) Max milliseconds a TCP socket will wait for receiving data (1000-90000). Default 10000.

quicIdleTimeout.description: (cluster) Milliseconds after which idle QUIC connection is closed (1000-90000). Default 60000.

quicMaxInboundStreams.description: (cluster) Max inbound bidirectional streams per QUIC connection (1-1000). Default 100.

maxConcurrentResolutionsPerCore.description: (cluster) Max concurrent async outbound resolutions per CPU core. Default 100.

webServiceLocalAddresses.description: Comma-separated IP addresses for the web service to listen on.

webServiceHttpPort.description: TCP port for web console and API. Default 5380.

webServiceEnableTls.description: Start HTTPS service for web service.

webServiceEnableHttp3.description: Enable HTTP/3 protocol for the web service.

webServiceTlsPort.description: TCP port for web console HTTPS access.

webServiceUseSelfSignedTlsCertificate.description: Use auto-generated self-signed certificate when TLS certificate path is not specified.

webServiceTlsCertificatePath.description: PKCS #12 (.pfx) file path for web console HTTPS.

webServiceTlsCertificatePassword.description: Certificate (.pfx) password for web service TLS.

webServiceRealIpHeader.description: HTTP header to read client's actual IP address from reverse proxy.

enableDnsOverUdpProxy.description: Accept DNS-over-UDP-PROXY requests (PROXY Protocol v1 & v2).

enableDnsOverTcpProxy.description: Accept DNS-over-TCP-PROXY requests (PROXY Protocol v1 & v2).

enableDnsOverHttp.description: Accept DNS-over-HTTP requests (for use with TLS-terminating reverse proxy).

reverseProxyNetworkACL.description: ACL for DNS-over-UDP-PROXY, TCP-PROXY, and HTTP. IP/network addresses, prefix ! to deny.

dnsTlsCertificatePath.description: PKCS #12 (.pfx) file path for DNS-over-TLS and DNS-over-HTTPS.

dnsOverHttpRealIpHeader.description: HTTP header to read client's actual IP from reverse proxy for DNS-over-HTTP.

tsigKeys.description: (cluster) Pipe-separated multi-row list of TSIG key name, shared secret, and algorithm. Set to false to remove all.

recursionNetworkACL.description: (cluster) Comma-separated ACL for recursion. Used only when recursion is UseSpecifiedNetworkACL. Set to false to remove.

randomizeName.description: (cluster) Enable QNAME randomization over UDP. Default true.

qnameMinimization.description: (cluster) Enable QNAME minimization for recursive resolution. Default true.

resolverRetries.description: (cluster) Number of retries for the recursive resolver.

resolverTimeout.description: (cluster) Timeout in milliseconds for the recursive resolver.

resolverConcurrency.description: (cluster) Number of concurrent requests by the recursive resolver.

resolverMaxStackCount.description: (cluster) Max stack count for the recursive resolver.

saveCache.description: Save DNS cache to disk on server stop.

serveStale.description: Serve stale (expired) records when upstream is unreachable. Default true.

serveStaleTtl.description: TTL in seconds for expired cached records. Max 7 days. Default 259200.

serveStaleAnswerTtl.description: TTL in seconds for records in a stale response (0-300). Recommended 30.

serveStaleResetTtl.description: TTL in seconds to reset stale record TTL on resolver failure (10-900). Recommended 30.

serveStaleMaxWaitTime.description: Milliseconds to wait before serving stale records (0-1800). Default 1800.

cacheMinimumRecordTtl.description: Minimum TTL value a record can have in cache. Default 10.

cacheMaximumRecordTtl.description: Maximum TTL value a record can have in cache. Default 86400.

cacheNegativeRecordTtl.description: Negative TTL when no SOA MINIMUM is available. Default 300.

cacheFailureRecordTtl.description: TTL for caching failure responses. Default 60.

cachePrefetchEligibility.description: Minimum initial TTL for a record to be eligible for prefetching.

cachePrefetchTrigger.description: TTL threshold to initiate prefetch. Set 0 to disable prefetching.

cachePrefetchSampleIntervalInMinutes.description: Interval in minutes to sample domain names from last-hour stats for auto prefetch.

cachePrefetchSampleEligibilityHitsPerHou.description: Minimum hits per hour for a domain to be eligible for auto prefetch.

enableBlocking.description: (cluster) Enable blocking via Blocked Zone and Block List Zone.

allowTxtBlockingReport.description: (cluster) Respond with TXT records containing block report for TXT queries.

blockingBypassList.description: (cluster) Comma-separated IP/network addresses allowed to bypass blocking.

blockingType.description: (cluster) How to respond to blocked domain requests. Default AnyAddress.

blockingAnswerTtl.description: (cluster) TTL in seconds for records in a blocking response.

customBlockingAddresses.description: (cluster) Comma-separated IP addresses for blocked domain response when blockingType is CustomAddress.

blockListUrls.description: (cluster) Comma-separated block list URLs for automatic download. Set to false to remove.

blockListUpdateIntervalHours.description: (cluster) Interval in hours to update block lists. Default 24.

proxyAddress.description: (cluster) Proxy server hostname or IP address.

proxyBypass.description: (cluster) Comma-separated bypass list (IPs, CIDR networks, hostnames) for proxy.

forwarders.description: (cluster) Comma-separated forwarder addresses. Set to false to remove and use recursive resolution.

concurrentForwarding.description: (cluster) Query forwarders concurrently instead of sequentially.

forwarderRetries.description: (cluster) Number of retries for the forwarder DNS client.

forwarderTimeout.description: (cluster) Timeout in milliseconds for the forwarder DNS client.

forwarderConcurrency.description: (cluster) Number of concurrent requests by the forwarder DNS client.

loggingType.description: How error and audit logs are written. Default File.

enableLogging.description: (obsolete, use loggingType) Enable logging to log file.

ignoreResolverLogs.description: Stop logging domain name resolution errors.

logQueries.description: Log every query and response. Default false.

useLocalTime.description: Use local time instead of UTC for logging. Default false.

logFolder.description: Folder path for log files (relative to DNS server config folder). Default logs.

maxLogFileDays.description: Max days to keep log files. Set 0 to disable auto delete.

enableInMemoryStats.description: Enable in-memory stats; only Last Hour data available, no disk storage.

maxStatFileDays.description: Max days to keep dashboard stats files. Set 0 to disable auto delete.

staticRoutes.description: Pipe-separated list of static routes in format {destination}|{subnetMask}|{router} (Option 121).

vendorInfo.description: Pipe-separated list of vendor info in format {vendor class identifier}|{vendor specific info hex string}.

tftpServerAddresses.description: Comma separated list of TFTP Server or VoIP Config Server addresses (Option 150).

genericOptions.description: Pipe-separated list of generic DHCP options in format {option-code}|{hex-string-value}.

exclusions.description: Pipe-separated list of IP ranges in format {startingAddress}|{endingAddress} to exclude from dynamic allocation.

reservedLeases.description: Pipe-separated list of reserved leases in format {hostName}|{MAC address}|{reserved IP}|{comments}.

allowOnlyReservedLeases.description: Stop dynamic allocation and only allocate reserved IP addresses.

blockLocallyAdministeredMacAddresses.description: Stop dynamic allocation for clients with locally administered MAC addresses.
